{/* ✧ VITALS & METRICS ───────────────────────────────── */}
        <Animated.View entering={FadeInDown.duration(400).delay(230)}>
          <View style={s.sectionHeader}>
            <Text style={[s.sectionTitle, { color: colors.foreground }]}>
              Health Metrics
            </Text>
            <Text style={[s.sectionLink, { color: colors.clay }]}>Sync Data</Text>
          </View>
          <ScrollView horizontal showsHorizontalScrollIndicator={false} contentContainerStyle={{ gap: 12 }}>
            <View style={[s.vitalCard, { backgroundColor: colors.surface, borderColor: colors.border }]}>
              <View style={[s.vitalIcon, { backgroundColor: "rgba(224, 72, 85, 0.1)" }]}>
                <Heart size={18} color="#E04855" />
              </View>
              <Text style={[s.vitalValue, { color: colors.foreground }]}>72 bpm</Text>
              <Text style={[s.vitalLabel, { color: colors.inkMuted }]}>Resting Heart</Text>
            </View>
            <View style={[s.vitalCard, { backgroundColor: colors.surface, borderColor: colors.border }]}>
              <View style={[s.vitalIcon, { backgroundColor: "rgba(79, 107, 219, 0.1)" }]}>
                <Moon size={18} color="#4F6BDB" />
              </View>
              <Text style={[s.vitalValue, { color: colors.foreground }]}>7hr 15m</Text>
              <Text style={[s.vitalLabel, { color: colors.inkMuted }]}>Sleep Last Night</Text>
            </View>
            <View style={[s.vitalCard, { backgroundColor: colors.surface, borderColor: colors.border }]}>
              <View style={[s.vitalIcon, { backgroundColor: "rgba(67, 160, 71, 0.1)" }]}>
                <Footprints size={18} color="#43A047" />
              </View>
              <Text style={[s.vitalValue, { color: colors.foreground }]}>8,420</Text>
              <Text style={[s.vitalLabel, { color: colors.inkMuted }]}>Steps Today</Text>
            </View>
          </ScrollView>
        </Animated.View>
